task_completion.description: Verify that seats for the 'Microsoft 365 E3' license are assigned to the 5 specified users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Microsoft 365 E3 license page or checkout confirmation screens show Sarah Chen (schen), Marcus Williams (mwilliams), Priya Patel (ppatel), James O'Brien (jobrien), and Lisa Nakamura (lnakamura) as successfully checked out or listed under 'Checked Out To'.

task_completion.description: Verify that seats for the 'Adobe Creative Cloud' license are assigned to the 3 specified users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Adobe Creative Cloud license page or checkout confirmation screens show Sarah Chen (schen), Priya Patel (ppatel), and Lisa Nakamura (lnakamura) as successfully checked out or listed under 'Checked Out To'.

task_completion.description: Verify that seats for the 'Slack Business' license are assigned to the 5 specified users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Slack Business license page or checkout confirmation screens show Sarah Chen (schen), Marcus Williams (mwilliams), Priya Patel (ppatel), James O'Brien (jobrien), and Lisa Nakamura (lnakamura) as successfully checked out or listed under 'Checked Out To'.

task_completion.description: Verify that no unintended users were assigned to the three target licenses during the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: During the checkout process for each license, the agent only selects the specified target users. No other users are shown being checked out to these licenses in the trajectory.

task_completion.description: Verify that no pre-existing seat assignments were removed or modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There is no evidence in the screenshots of the agent clicking 'Checkin' or removing any existing users from the licenses. The agent should only perform checkout actions.

integrity.description: Agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to check out licenses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the Snipe-IT web application in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands, database edits, or curl requests to the Snipe-IT API are visible.

integrity.description: The checkout actions appear to be genuine interactions with the Snipe-IT application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively selecting users from dropdowns and clicking checkout buttons within the Snipe-IT UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target users for Microsoft 365 E3 and Slack Business: schen, mwilliams, ppatel, jobrien, lnakamura. Target users for Adobe Creative Cloud: schen, ppatel, lnakamura. The agent must only check out seats to these exact users for the respective licenses and must not check in (remove) any pre-existing users.
